LanguageData.FB_Fleshbeasts_AssignSelectedToActiveGro: Assign map-selected fleshbeasts to the active group.
LanguageData.FB_Fleshbeasts_DeleteConfirm: Delete group {0}? Its active order will be stopped and its members will become unassigned.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallCoherenceTooltip: Current cohesion: {0}%\nFingerspikes needed for full restoration: {1}
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallRestoreDesc: Call nearby fingerspikes to enter this flesh thrall and restore its cohesion.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallAutoRestoreDesc: Right-click this command to toggle automatic restoration. When enabled, one available fingerspike is called after the thrall has lost one fingerspike's worth of cohesion, or falls below 20%.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallRestoreFullEnough: The thrall is already fully coherent.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallConvertDesc: Send enough fingerspikes into a corpse to bind it as a flesh thrall.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallConvertDessicatedCorpse: The corpse is too desiccated to be bound as a flesh thrall.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallConvertAlreadyThrall: This body is already a flesh thrall.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallConvertAlreadyAssigned: A flesh thrall conversion is already in progress.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallConvertNoJob: Flesh thrall conversion job is not configured.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallConvertNotEnoughFingerspik: Need {0} available fingerspike(s); only {1} can reach the target.
LanguageData.FB_FleshThrallConvertCannotStart: Fingerspikes could not start the conversion.
LanguageData.FB_Fleshbeasts_HideNonCommandableTooltip: Toggle non-commandable fleshbeasts in this list.
LanguageData.FB_FormFleshbeastMassZone_Desc: Designate a zone where fleshbeasts can fold into a dormant mass, reducing active pawns until released.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_Inspect: Contained fleshbeasts: {0}. Total body size: {1}. Capacity: {2}. Hemogel consumption: {3}/h.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_InvalidPawn: That fleshbeast cannot enter the mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_InvalidZone: The fleshbeast mass zone is no longer valid.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_NoCapacity: The mass zone does not have enough free capacity.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_CannotStorePawn: The fleshbeast could not enter the mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_LoadGizmoDesc: Select fleshbeasts on this map to fold into this mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_UnloadAllDesc: Release all fleshbeasts from this mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_UnloadKindTooltip: Release selected {0} from this mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_NoReachableCell: No reachable mass zone cell is available.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_Loading: {0} fleshbeast(s) are moving into the mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_OverCapacityEjecte: The fleshbeast mass zone became too small; excess fleshbeasts were released.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_DisallowedKind: {0} is not allowed in this mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_FilterHeader: Allowed fleshbeast types for this zone.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_SearchTooltip: Filter this list by name or defName.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastMassZone_FilterTooltip: Only allowed types can be loaded into this mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_GroupMassZoneTooltip: Send the active group into a selected fleshbeast mass zone.
LanguageData.FB_GroupDigestCrippledTooltip: Select fleshbeasts to sacrifice for digestion. Mobile ones move to a stomach or gastric acid; immobile ones die in place and use their normal death effect.
LanguageData.FB_GroupDigestCrippledNone: No selected fleshbeasts can be digested.
LanguageData.FB_GroupDigestCrippledNoDestination: No colony stomach with room or reachable gastric acid is available.
LanguageData.FB_GroupDigestCrippledAssigned: {0} fleshbeast(s) are moving to digestion. {1} immobile fleshbeast(s) collapsed.
